1071→ def test_plan_saved_marker_flow_blocks_and_cleans_up(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None: 1072→ """Verify plan-saved marker blocks exit with Step 2 and deletes the marker.""" 1073→ runner = CliRunner() 1074→ session_id = "session-abc123" 1075→ 1076→ # Create .erk/ to mark as managed project 1077→ (tmp_path / ".erk").mkdir() 1078→ 1079→ # Create plan-saved marker with plan number on first line 1080→ marker_dir = tmp_path / ".erk" / "scratch" / "sessions" / session_id 1081→ marker_dir.mkdir(parents=True) 1082→ plan_saved_marker = marker_dir / "exit-plan-mode-hook.plan-saved.marker" 1083→ plan_saved_marker.write_text("42\nCreated by test", encoding="utf-8") 1084→ 1085→ # Inject via ErkContext - NO mocking needed 1086→ ctx = ErkContext.for_test(repo_root=tmp_path, cwd=tmp_path) 1087→ 1088→ stdin_data = json.dumps({"session_id": session_id}) 1089→ result = runner.invoke(exit_plan_mode_hook, input=stdin_data, obj=ctx) 1090→ 1091→ assert result.exit_code == 2 1092→ assert "PR #42 saved" in result.output 1093→ assert "erk pr dispatch 42" in result.output 1094→ assert not plan_saved_marker.exists() # Marker deleted after session ends 1095→ 1096→ def test_incremental_plan_marker_flow(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None: 1097→ """Verify incremental-plan marker is deleted and exit is allowed.""" 1098→ runner = CliRunner() 1099→ session_id = "session-abc123" 1100→
... [30 lines omitted] ...

1173→ def test_objective_context_marker_deleted_on_plan_saved(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None: 1174→ """Verify both plan-saved and objective-context markers are deleted on plan-saved.""" 1175→ runner = CliRunner() 1176→ session_id = "session-abc123" 1177→ 1178→ # Create .erk/ to mark as managed project 1179→ (tmp_path / ".erk").mkdir() 1180→ 1181→ # Create both plan-saved and objective-context markers 1182→ marker_dir = tmp_path / ".erk" / "scratch" / "sessions" / session_id 1183→ marker_dir.mkdir(parents=True) 1184→ plan_saved_marker = marker_dir / "exit-plan-mode-hook.plan-saved.marker" 1185→ plan_saved_marker.write_text("42\nCreated by test", encoding="utf-8") 1186→ objective_context_marker = marker_dir / "objective-context.marker" 1187→ objective_context_marker.write_text("3679", encoding="utf-8") 1188→ 1189→ # Inject via ErkContext - NO mocking needed 1190→ ctx = ErkContext.for_test(repo_root=tmp_path, cwd=tmp_path) 1191→ 1192→ stdin_data = json.dumps({"session_id": session_id}) 1193→ result = runner.invoke(exit_plan_mode_hook, input=stdin_data, obj=ctx) 1194→ 1195→ assert result.exit_code == 2 1196→ assert "PR #42 saved" in result.output 1197→ assert not plan_saved_marker.exists() # Marker deleted 1198→ assert not objective_context_marker.exists() # Objective marker also deleted 1199→ 1200→ def test_branch_manager_used_for_pr_lookup(self, tmp_path: Path) -> None: 1201→ """Verify branch_manager is created and used correctly for PR lookups. 1202→
